title: Allow Calendar View to Start on Sunday
excerpt: I’m embedding a Calendar view to an internal company webpage so the rest of the company can see what my team is up to. I would like this calendar view to start on Sunday, not Monday. Is that possible? I see where the Dat…

posts.author: TIMS-Crystal (Crystal Hopper)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m embedding a Calendar view to an internal company webpage so the rest of the company can see what my team is up to. I would like this calendar view to start on Sunday, not Monday. Is that possible? I see where the Date Picker can start on Sunday, but not calendars.

posts.author: davidski (David Severski)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this old request. Having Monday’s calendar start on Monday is thematically appropriate but causes confusion when looking at other calendar tools, which typically start on Sunday. Please give us the option to choose a Sunday start date to avoid UX confusion between tools!

posts.author: shaks (Shaked)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, how are you doing? Hope ya’ll are well.
I’m a member of a student union, head of the culture department and we would like ask again for this feature to be added, it would help me personally very much. I have ADHD and I have to be organized and it bothers very very much and if I won’t be organized everything will fall apart and I * really really* need this feature so I can coordinate all my events properly and without I cant do anything I can’t bring Noa Kiril here please please please help me

Thank you
peace and love
xoxo

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Following up, this is really important. The United States typically displays calendars Sunday - Saturday with a workweek of Monday-Friday.

To have a Monday-Friday workweek, the calendar display must be Monday-Sunday currently. This confuses the heck out of us weird Americans.

This cannot be that hard to do, as its been a common feature in many applications for decades.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey all, Calendar Plus supports picking any day as your week’s start day as part of our free plan. Sunday, Monday, heck, pick Wednesday! (We don’t support embedding just yet.)

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TIMS-Crystal @davidski You’re invited to try our advanced calendar app! It allows you to set full or work week displays and choose the first day of the week. Plus, you’ll find many more configuration options to customize your experience. check it out: monday.com apps marketplace
